description.content: Static Application Security Testing — native ALdeci scanner (sast_engine.py, 465 LOC)
Dynamic Application Security Testing — native ALdeci scanner (dast_engine.py, 533 LOC)
Secrets Detection — native ALdeci scanner (secrets_scanner.py, 775 LOC). 200+ patterns, entropy analysis.
Container Security — native ALdeci scanner (container_scanner.py, 410 LOC). Dockerfile analysis, image scanning, CVE matching.

  "dockerfile_content": "FROM python:3.11
RUN pip install flask
USER root
EXPOSE 22

RUN pip install flask
USER root
EXPOSE 80",

description.content: Cloud Security Posture Management & Infrastructure-as-Code scanning (cspm_analyzer.py, 586 LOC + iac_router.py, 243 LOC)
API endpoint discovery and fuzzing — native ALdeci scanner (api_fuzzer_router.py, 56 LOC)
Malware analysis — native ALdeci scanner (malware_router.py, 59 LOC). Content analysis, signature matching, heuristic detection.
LLM Security Monitor — prompt injection detection, jailbreak detection, PII leakage prevention (llm_monitor_router.py)

exec: // Response may use various keys for analysis results

description.content: Open Source Security / Software Composition Analysis — Trivy, Grype, Sigstore, OPA integration (oss_tools.py, 206 LOC)
AI-Powered AutoFix — 10 fix types, confidence-based auto-apply, PR generation (autofix_engine.py, 1,260 LOC + autofix_router.py, 270 LOC)
Software Bill of Materials generation + input format validation (inventory_router.py + validation_router.py, 492 LOC)
12-Step CTEM Brain Pipeline — the architectural backbone of ALdeci (brain_pipeline.py, 864 LOC). Tests the full Discover→Validate→Remediate→Comply lifecycle.

These endpoints work AIR-GAPPED — no external tool dependencies required.
